sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state. Looking at the image, I can see the yellow cross has reappeared! It's at the same position as before (around row 12-15, col 15-18). The blue cross is at the top left (player position).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation
white_nodes = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W']
print(f"Player: {white_nodes[0]['boundary'] if white_nodes else 'none'}")

yellow_single = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] == 1]
print(f"Yellow dots: {len(yellow_single)}")
for n in yellow_single:
    print(f"  at {n['boundary']}")

yellow_large = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 10]
print(f"Yellow cross: {len(yellow_large)}")
for n in yellow_large:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:6]}...")

blue_single = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 1]
print(f"Blue dots: {len(blue_single)}")
for n in blue_single:
    print(f"  at {n['boundary']}")

print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
